title: Add paused and done visual behaviors to game engine
description: Extend the game engine AgentStatus type with paused and done states, wire through data layer, and implement distinct visual behaviors for each status.

scope.in: AgentStatus enum expansion, toAgentStatus mapping, officeState behavioral logic, roomZones routing, status icon sprites, renderer frame rates, panel badge variants, priority map updates
scope.out: Server-side aggregator changes (already done), new character animation frames, sound effects

dod.criterion: AgentStatus type includes paused and done across all definition sites
Paused agents sit at desk in idle pose; done agents linger then walk to break room

tasks.title: Add paused/done to AgentStatus enum and wire through data layer
tasks.user_scenario: When the server reports an agent as paused or done, the game engine receives the correct distinct status instead of collapsing both to idle.
tasks.scope: Add 'paused' and 'done' to the AgentStatus enum in both pixel-types.ts and types.ts (or consolidate to one source). Update toAgentStatus in GamePage.tsx to map server paused/done states to the new enum values instead of 'idle'. Update the priority map. Update statusBadgeVariant in panelUtils.ts. Update AgentPanel.tsx, TeamPanel.tsx. Add paused/done cases to renderer frame rate switch. Add sprite entries in statusIcons.ts. Fix all TypeScript exhaustiveness errors.

dod.criterion: AgentStatus type includes 'paused' and 'done' in all definition sites
toAgentStatus maps server 'paused' to 'paused' and 'done' to 'done'
npm run type-check passes with zero errors — all switches and Records handle 7 values
statusIcons.ts exports sprite frame data for paused and done icons
panelUtils statusBadgeVariant returns distinct color/label for paused and done

tasks.title: Implement paused stay-at-desk and done linger-then-break-room behaviors
tasks.user_scenario: A paused agent sits at their desk in idle pose without wandering; a done agent lingers briefly then walks to the break room.
tasks.scope: In officeState.ts applyAgentStatus, handle paused (isActive=false, no route) and done (trigger linger timer). In roomZones.ts chooseDestination, add paused→null and done→break-room. Ensure linger timer countdown transitions done agents correctly.

dod.criterion: Paused agent remains at assigned desk in idle pose — chooseDestination returns null for paused
Done agent stays at desk for LINGER_MIN to LINGER_MAX seconds then walks to break room
Transitioning from done back to working/idle causes normal behavior to resume (no stuck state)
npm run type-check passes with zero errors

sequencing_rationale: Task 1 establishes the type system foundation — every file compiles cleanly with 7 values. Task 2 builds on that to implement behavioral logic in officeState and roomZones.
